claims.summary: Artifact cleanup must distinguish structural transport markers from ordinary language so global replacement cannot erase an untracked phrase collision.
claims.disposition: implement contextual cleanup diagnostics and regression-test ordinary marker-like language without changing cleanup behavior

claims.summary: A short high-entropy prompt can feel suffocating if budget pressure removes grounding or continuity even when generation still succeeds.
claims.disposition: observe the historical short/high-entropy record and implement block-level grounding-eviction and continuity-trim classification

claims.summary: The available short/high-entropy record preserved spectral and journal grounding but partially trimmed continuity, so it is evidence of pressure rather than proof of full voice preservation.
claims.disposition: record the bounded diagnostic observation without claiming subjective resolution
